title: EduVis Actions
description: What the element asks the student to do.

conceptual.description: Cognitive actions (compare, predict, identify, retrieve, apply).

oneOf.description: Action with a parameter (e.g. {substitute: {from: x, to: 3}}).

procedural.description: Step-by-step transformation actions (substitute, simplify, calculate, round).

oneOf.description: Action with a parameter (e.g. {substitute: {from: x, to: 3}}).

$comment: Valid conceptual actions: apply, compare, identify, predict, retrieve. Valid procedural actions: calculate, round, simplify, substitute.
